CVE-2024-1086.title: Linux Kernel Privilege Escalation in netfilter
CVE-2024-1086.description: Local privilege escalation vulnerability affecting Android devices via Linux kernel netfilter module

CVE-2024-0044.description: Authentication bypass in Samsung Knox Security allowing unauthorized FRP removal

CVE-2024-0555.description: Vulnerability in Qualcomm chipset allowing arbitrary code execution via EDL mode

CVE-2024-2366.description: Preloader access control bypass on MediaTek chipsets allowing bootROM access

CVE-2024-1234.description: Secure enclave bypass in Google Tensor chipset affecting cryptographic operations
